ads.author: Wes Warren
ads.title: Pinball Machine
ads.description: Xenon Pinball machine, it lights up but nothing else. No sure what’s it worth. Need it gone. Best offer and it’s yours

ads.author: Bob Warren
ads.title: Williams Swinger EM Pinball Machine
ads.description: The Swinger Pinball machine was manufactured in 1972 by Williams and is the two-player version of the Fun Fest pinball machine. This machine is an electromagnetic machine without all of the complex computer parts. It is in good condition with a clean playfield and back glass. This is pick up only. Price is $900 OBO.

ads.author: Ronnie Driver
ads.title: Romstar
ads.description: Kageki (1988) is a 1-on-1 fighting arcade game, licensed by Romstar, where players control a bandaged street fighter navigating nine rounds against a motorcycle gang, the Warriors. Very rare find.

ads.author: Richard Newman
ads.title: Space Invaders Trimline Vintage Arcade Restored to NEW
ads.description: This is a Taito Space Invaders Trimline cabinet, the cabinet is new, the internals are all original (game board, wiring, screen, coin door and front art). Machine is fully functional including coin slots. For a collector, this is a really nice find. Located in Lacombe LA, pickup only.

ads.author: Joel Fritzinger
ads.title: EM pinballs
ads.description: Local pickup only. Vintage pinball machines. $900 each. Each one needs minor repairs, we just don’t have time to keep up with them as these are located in a business. Royal Flush(pending sale) & King Pin have new bumpers, new balls, new LED lighting. Each has an issue with kicking the ball out of the trough. Beat Time needs a new power cord. (We think). Otherwise working good before it stopped powering on. 2001 has a grounding issue on one of the paddle buttons, and one score reel gets stuck from time to time. Seriously inquiries only. Thank you.

ads.author: Kelly's Furniture
ads.title: Spider stompin arcade game
ads.description: Spider stomping deluxe video arcade game. Full-size all original it does work. Volume is low, but it’s probably a control inside that. I don’t know how to do. Trout river blvd

ads.author: Paul Murphy
ads.title: Tekken 3 arcade machine
ads.description: For sale is a working Tekken 3 fighting arcade game. It is currently setup to take quarters. The volume is low as I am not sure how to turn it up. The monitor was upgraded to and LCD. Would consider trades towards other arcade games and pinball machines.

ads.author: Carolyn Johnson
ads.title: Vintage arcade machine
ads.description: Arcade machine works needs cosmetic work need it gone asap.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $325 OBO Capcom Bowling upright cabinet. Condition: • Cabinet is very old and needs some love. • Monitor powers on, image is good, but probably needs new caps for long-term reliability. • Lights come on. • Sound works. • Controls are functional. • Sold as-is. • Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $200 (or best offer) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Wiring, coin door, misc ($40)

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: P.O.W. Prisoners of War, Upright Arcade, SNK 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $275 OBO P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Mike Estep
ads.title: Antique pinball machine
ads.description: Antique pinball machine. Does come on and partially operates. Have original schematics. Also have replacement kit of lights and other new parts. 1200.00

ads.author: Jon Sutcliffe
ads.title: Space Mission Pinball - 4 Player
ads.description: 1976 Williams Space Mission. This is the 4-player version of Space Odyssey. Does power-up but is non working. Play field lights, score motor runs. Back glass and play field are in great condition, look at pictures, ask for more. Cabinet is decent. Back of box is ugly, see pictures. Legs are ugly. Includes new rubbers kit. Prefer local pickup so you can check out condition but I will ship if you make all shipper arrangements. Pinside Info: Estimated value $1110 - $1290 https://pinside.com/pinball/machine/space-mission

ads.author: Jacob Barker
ads.title: (PENDING) Sony Trinitron 32 in CRT – If You Know You Know – Retro Gaming Beast
ads.description: If you know you know 32” Sony Trinitron CRT one of the BEST TVs ever made for retro gaming. This is the real deal not a cheap CRT. True zero input lag, buttery smooth motion, and the exact look these games were meant to have. Perfect for GameCube Smash Melee Mario Kart Double Dash N64 GoldenEye Mario Party PS2 classics OG Xbox VHS and DVD nostalgia setups These TVs are getting harder and harder to find especially in this size and condition Built like a tank incredible picture quality and that classic Trinitron color pop Includes Front AV inputs ready to plug and play Great for a retro gaming setup or basement arcade vibe Fair warning it’s heavy bring help Serious buyers only this is a collector piece

ads.author: Chris Castiglione
ads.title: Midway Cruis'n USA sit-down arcade racing game
ads.description: There is no black line on the screen like the video shows, it’s just because I’m recording a screen. One side works the other side gets power but the screen doesn’t come on. Pick up near whiteys

ads.title: Nfl Blitz
ads.description: 2 player Nfl Blitz with a nice crisp crt good working 49way joysticks and good working buttons in a locally built sturdy arcade cabinet

ads.title: 1970s pinball glass. Excellent condition, bright colors and the desired space theme
ads.description: Desired space theme , excellent condition

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: John Russo
ads.title: Tekken 3 coin operated arcade game
ads.description: Great looking conversion into what was a Mortal Kombat cabinet. 25 inch CRT is bright and clear Works 100%. Good for your man cave, your Airbnb, or your commercial application. Can arrange local delivery nationwide shipping always glad to take trades for other coin games.

ads.author: David Lamitina
ads.title: Space Invaders Pinball Backglass
ads.description: Bally Space Invaders Pinball Machine Game Backglass ORIGINAL. No Box, No Machine, This is the back glass only. Has some flaking on bottom edge. Still good condition for age. Check out what they sell fro on Ebay. Lawrenceville. NO SHIPPING

ads.author: Diane Jones
ads.title: Six Million Dollar Man back glass
ads.description: In good shape. Pinball machine back glass. Husband has had this for ages. Just trying to clean out shop.

ads.author: Natalie Oliver
ads.title: (PENDING) 1985 Factory Original Rush'N Attack Arcade Game fully functional
ads.description: This is the factory built game. Everything works !! Marquee lighting, joy stick, and computer board in great working condition. The cabinet has some minor damage but all original.

ads.author: William Latimer
ads.title: Vintage Gottlieb Hi-Diver Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Gottlieb Hi-Diver pinball machine. Has a pool theme with diver artwork. The machine is not working, has some rust and wear. The cabinet has some damage and the paint is faded. The glass is intact.

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.

ads.description: This machine is 50 yrs old get it before it’s gone. $800 serious inquiries only. Call me 8 one 3 8nine 8 four 3 0 eight

ads.description: CPR gold shadow playfield with playfield Protector included. Nevwr installed If you have any questions, please let me know. Thanks!

ads.title: Adams family arcade machine missing parts
ads.description: This came in a bundle deal looking to recover cost only missing 2 boards and play field spinner by the looks of it but may be missing more . Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Hang On Project Cab
ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.author: Cory Anderson
ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Trussville Woodworks
ads.title: ARCADE GAME
ads.description: Dual seat SEGA GT racer. Old style arcade. Collector's item. Needs TLC but works great. One wheel needs shimmed to use.

ads.author: Kevin Coughlin
ads.title: Gottlieb Devils Dare Pinball Machine Project
ads.description: Cabinet and populated playfield, no backbox.. in very good condition.. all wiring and mechs intact..

ads.description: Multiple arcade machines for sale.
